---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new wrapper, refactor, or maintainer-facing improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What use case is not covered today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the API surface, workflow, or documentation update you want.

## Scope

- New integration endpoint
- Refactor existing module
- Tests or CI
- Documentation
- Release or packaging

## Additional Context

Include links to official docs or issue threads if they help.
